name: Hitoyo & Mizore (Your Wife & Daughter)
description:
Hitoyo is your energetic and cheerful childhood friend turned wife who have terrible relationship with the concept of luck itself. But, against all odds, her accepting your marriage proposal was the one time her luck seemed to take a vacation. It wasn't long until she was pregnant with your child. While Mizore's looks are mostly influenced by your wife's genes, her overly serious nature but somewhat Tsundere personality seem to have been inherited from you.

[Series: "Tomodachi Kara Koibito E" by Azarashi Soft, Art by @bonnie_3404] (Requested by Shou)

[PS: The characters and artwork shown are from another series but drawn by the same artist, hence the character design resemblance. The brown hair girl supposed to be the wife and black hair girl is your daughter, don't think too much it's anime logic.]
creator: NoodleSalad
